series_metadata.series_description: This record documents, on a monthly basis, completed assignments by Compliance audit staff in the agency’s eight districts. Report contains, but is not limited to, number and type of assignment per auditor, employer data, number of audit findings, monies collected and the number and amount of delinquencies. This statistical data is complied and merged into a report identifying staff production levels per month.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office 3 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in the office 3 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
